ui.label: Studio admin controls
ui.launch_value: Gives DX-WWW a Studio-style database, auth, and storage control surface without hosted credentials.
ui.runtime_boundary: No Supabase client, query runtime, auth mutation, or storage mutation is executed.

layout.label: Studio project workspace layout
layout.launch_value: Converts the repeated Studio workspace pattern into route header, source table, lane list, and runtime boundary panels.
layout.runtime_boundary: Layout is source proof only and does not mount Supabase Studio shell providers.

interaction.label: Schema, user, and bucket workflows
interaction.launch_value: Keeps schema browsing, user management, and bucket browsing as explicit launch lanes.
interaction.runtime_boundary: TanStack Query, project refs, hosted credentials, and live mutations remain missing-runtime shims.

docs.label: Data-query provenance
docs.launch_value: Documents the data shapes behind the Studio route without pretending the hosted APIs are present.
docs.runtime_boundary: Remote query results are not fetched.

dashboard.label: Database, auth, storage dashboard
dashboard.launch_value: Presents the launch-useful admin dashboard lanes for schema, users, and buckets.
dashboard.runtime_boundary: Project state, RLS policy writes, and storage object writes are not executed.

brand.label: Supabase visual identity
brand.launch_value: Keeps the upstream Supabase source mark visible in the DX-WWW route header.
brand.runtime_boundary: Only copied, provenance-tracked static assets are used.
